# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the focused change.

## Checklist

- [ ] The activation rules remain scoped to concrete modular/robust architecture implementation work.
- [ ] The skill still requires a conversation gate before scanning or editing.
- [ ] The skill still supports evidence-based follow-up questions after project inspection.
- [ ] New guidance is implementation-ready and verifiable.
- [ ] Examples remain generic and reusable.
- [ ] README updates are included when behavior changes.
- [ ] No private or domain-specific project details were introduced.
